top3.sql:
SELECT 
    AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) AS average_build_up_speed,
    AVG(buildUpPlayDribbling) AS average_build_up_dribbling,
    AVG(buildUpPlayPassing) AS average_build_up_passing
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'ADO Den Haag';

SELECT AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) AS freedom_of_movement
FROM Team t
JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'ADO Den Haag';

SELECT 
    AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) AS average_build_up_speed,
    AVG(buildUpPlayDribbling) AS average_build_up_dribbling,
    AVG(buildUpPlayPassing) AS average_build_up_passing
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'ADO Den Haag';

SELECT AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) AS freedom_of_movement
FROM Team t
JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'ADO Den Haag';

SELECT 
    AVG(defencePressure) AS average_defence_pressure,
    AVG(defenceAggression) AS average_defence_aggression,
    AVG(defenceTeamWidth) AS average_defence_team_width
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'ADO Den Haag';

SELECT 
    AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) AS average_build_up_speed,
    AVG(buildUpPlayDribbling) AS average_build_up_dribbling,

FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'ADO Den Haag';

SELECT AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) AS freedom_of_movement
FROM Team t
JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'ADO Den Haag';

SELECT 
    AVG(defencePressure) AS average_defence_pressure,
    AVG(defenceAggression) AS average_defence_aggression,
    AVG(defenceTeamWidth) AS average_defence_team_width
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'ADO Den Haag';
